generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for stereo vision"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageStreamTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring current speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor measuring current steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageStreamTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stereo depth image data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageStreamTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ClusteredLidarData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustered object points"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Relational database for storing vehicle and object tracking data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted, DepthImageStreamTransmitted, VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic per ISO 15622 standard"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Object tracking using Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for edge computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring with display, saving, and reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataMonitoringInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system computation to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadingInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, set speed, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACCAction, SetSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTime3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated report generation for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC control logic implementation based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionInsight
]

instance DataMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring status and alerts"
]

instance ComputationOffloadingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Offloading status and performance metrics"
]

instance RealTime3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports for analysis"
]

instance ACCDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC decisions based on lead vehicle distance"
]

instance EnableDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator converting desired speed to voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for vehicle control"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin running on the vehicle hardware"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin running in cloud environment"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Remote user interface for monitoring and control"
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for data monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of desired speed commands (motor voltage), steering commands, and emergency braking signals via the Actuation Functional Entity."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity; clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Structured into Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, and Cross-System Entity with specific Functional Entities; sensor data flows via ROS2 network and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase during vehicle operation for ACC system optimization and health monitoring."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC system implemented per ISO 15622; latency and clock synchronization requirements ensure real-time safety-critical operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 (DDS) for intra-system communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; standardized interface per R1."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle hardware (Jetson Orin Nano); Digital Twin Entity components cloud-deployed; User Entity remote; data stored in external SQL database."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 for architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requiring ≤100 ms network latency and 100 ms clock synchronization; cybersecurity measures not specified."
]
